# Schema Documentation

This documentation describes a [ZModel](https://zenstack.dev/docs/reference/zmodel/overview) schema — the data modeling language used by [ZenStack](https://zenstack.dev/).

> 9 models · 3 views · 2 types · 3 enums · 7 procedures

[Models](#models) · [Views](#views) · [Types](#types) · [Enums](#enums) · [Procedures](#procedures) · [Relationships](./relationships.md) · [ERD](#erd)

<a id="models"></a>

## 🗃️ Models

- [Activity](./models/Activity.md) — Records significant events for audit and activity feed purposes.
- [Comment](./models/Comment.md) — A comment on a task.
- [Organization](./models/Organization.md) — An organization is the top-level tenant in the system.
- [Project](./models/Project.md) — A project organizes tasks under a team within an organization.
- [Tag](./models/Tag.md) — A label that can be attached to tasks and projects for categorization.
- [Task](./models/Task.md) — A unit of work within a project.
- [Team](./models/Team.md) — A team groups users within an organization for project collaboration.
- [TeamMember](./models/TeamMember.md) — Represents a user's membership in a team with a specific role.
- [User](./models/User.md) — A registered user in the platform.

<a id="views"></a>

## 👁️ Views

- [ProjectTaskSummary](./views/ProjectTaskSummary.md) — Aggregated task metrics per project for analytics dashboards.
- [UserLeaderboard](./views/UserLeaderboard.md) — Leaderboard view ranking users by completed task count.
- [UserProfile](./views/UserProfile.md) — Flattened user profile for reporting dashboards.

<a id="types"></a>

## 🧩 Types

- [ProjectStats](./types/ProjectStats.md) — Aggregated statistics for a project dashboard.
- [Timestamps](./types/Timestamps.md)

<a id="enums"></a>

## 🏷️ Enums

- [Priority](./enums/Priority.md) — Priority levels for tasks.
- [Role](./enums/Role.md) — Defines the access level of a user within an organization.
- [TaskStatus](./enums/TaskStatus.md) — Lifecycle status of a task.

<a id="procedures"></a>

## ⚡ Procedures

- [archiveProject](./procedures/archiveProject.md) · *mutation* — Archive a project and all its tasks.
- [bulkUpdateTaskStatus](./procedures/bulkUpdateTaskStatus.md) · *mutation* — Bulk-update the status of multiple tasks at once.
- [createAndAssignTask](./procedures/createAndAssignTask.md) · *mutation* — Create a new task and assign it to a user in one step.
- [getProjectStats](./procedures/getProjectStats.md) · *query* — Get aggregated statistics for a project.
- [getUser](./procedures/getUser.md) · *query* — Retrieve a user by their unique identifier.
- [listOrgUsers](./procedures/listOrgUsers.md) · *query* — List all users belonging to a given organization.
- [signUp](./procedures/signUp.md) · *mutation* — Register a new user in the platform.
